items.keyword: best dental practice brokers in Ontario
items.title: Best Dental Practice Brokers in Ontario: 7 Factors to Compare Before You Choose

serpNotes.intent: Commercial BOFU: dentists comparing Ontario dental practice brokers before selling, buying or requesting a valuation.
observations: Exact SERP checks in Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo were noisy for the 'best' wording, with irrelevant consumer and general dental-care results appearing; relevant market pages are broker home/service/listing pages rather than editorial rankings.
Relevant broker pages emphasize valuations, buying, selling, active listings, confidentiality, testimonials and Canada/Ontario geographic coverage.
Gap identified: a neutral comparison framework that avoids unverifiable 'best' claims and helps Ontario dentists evaluate brokers by process, confidentiality and valuation depth.

items.notes: Published and verified on the custom domain after Cloudflare deployment.
